_description: Wave 215, ep02 rewrite. Margie role corrected to Society Correspondent per current masthead. Two video segments rendering via Higgsfield MCP 2026-05-30.
title: The Society Correspondent Files From Abroad

voiceover.instructions: Deadpan documentary register. Slow, level, slightly weary.

segments.name: title_open
segments.text:
DISPATCH FROM MONACO

Week six of
a working visit
segments.narration: Dispatch from Monaco. Week six of a working visit.
segments.instructions: Documentary opener. 'A working visit' delivered exactly the same as 'Monaco' — no irony in the read.

segments.name: margie_yacht
segments.narration: The Society Correspondent has filed copy from a yacht, a vineyard, and a small claims court.
segments.instructions: List the three locations as if reading expense codes. Flat between each comma.

segments.name: margie_phone
segments.narration: She insists this counts as in-office.
segments.instructions: Six words. No comedic emphasis on 'insists' — the comedy is the report-style framing.

segments.name: closing_tag
segments.instructions: Closing line. Slight pause before delivery. Documentary-narrator falling tone.
